name: Ji-ho Hak // Uniform kink
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Kinktober day 3

Halloween was getting closer which meant stores would be filled with all kinds of costumes again.

Ji-ho came up with the great idea to buy one and surprise you with it. All he now had to hope for was that you would like the surprise and the costume on him..

_____________________________

this could count as a few other things as well, but I don’t even care anymore 😭 I’ve had to change this dude at least 3 times and ended up with this

I’m just doing whatever so please don’t tear me apart 😔

I also mentally cringed a few times but I hope you guys don’t find it as cringe as I did…

[art credits: unknown]
creator: Brickyard
